loginSubtitle: Staff access to the MoPD Complaint Management System.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your staff email. If an account exists, we will send reset instructions.
forgotPasswordErrorGeneric: Unable to process your request. Please try again.
resetPasswordSuccessBody: Password has been reset. Sign in with your new password.
resetPasswordMissingTokenBody: Open the full reset link from your email — it includes a token query parameter.
resetPasswordErrorGeneric: Unable to reset your password. Try again or request a new link.
loginErrorGeneric: Unable to sign in. Check your credentials and try again.
showcaseBody: Secure staff workspace for complaint intake, case workflow, SLA monitoring, and ministry reporting — built for transparency and accountability.
showcaseCardBody: Manage the full complaint lifecycle from submission through resolution with role-based access and audit trails.
sessionExpiredBody: Your session has ended. Sign in again to continue.
forbiddenBody: You do not have permission to view this page. If you believe this is a mistake, sign in with an authorized account or return to the home page.
changePasswordSubtitle: You must set a new password before continuing.
changePasswordError: Unable to change password. Check your current password and try again.
mfaVerifySubtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app or a backup code.
mfaEnrollSubtitle: We strongly recommend setting up an authenticator app now to protect your account. You can switch to email OTP later in Profile → MFA.
mfaEnrollRequiredSubtitle: Your role requires an authenticator app (TOTP) before you can use the console.
mfaEnrollSkipHint: You can enable two-factor authentication anytime under Profile → MFA.
mfaSkipError: Unable to skip MFA setup. Try again.
mfaSettingsSubtitle: Manage how you verify your identity at sign-in.
mfaSettingsTotpOnly: Your role requires an authenticator app (TOTP). Email OTP is not available.
mfaSettingsError: Unable to update MFA settings. Try again.
mfaMethodEmailSuccess: Sign-in verification will use email OTP.
mfaMethodTotpSuccess: Sign-in verification will use your authenticator app.
ssoBody: SSO is not enabled for this environment. Sign in with your staff email and password.
